title: narcissus poeticus subsp. radiiflorus
intro: Narcissus poeticus subsp. radiiflorus, also known as the Poet's Narcissus or Small-flowered Poet's Narcissus, is a subspecies of the species Narcissus poeticus, a type of perennial bulbous plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Narcissus poeticus subsp. radiiflorus include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
